title: Momonosuke Becomes Shogun
description: On pages 4–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Wano Citizens, Yamato, Unknown person #6, Denjiro as Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.
scene: Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I submitted to that monster when he showed up because I knew doing otherwise would be courting death.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But kid and his crew fought to the bitter end... they were prepared to die!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But even if I did foresee his victory...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Do you really think I would have gone crawling back to him?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you're gonna switch sides, now's the time.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What are your cards telling you?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am divining tomorrow's survival chances for a certain man.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: only 1%, what a pity.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When you were foretelling the future, the man you were talking about...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It was me...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The flower capital, seven days after the end of the war

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Don't take down the decorations yet!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: MOMONOSUKE- SAMA... NO, THE SHOGUN HAS DECREED THAT...

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: We'll have another festival soon!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Ms. Sarahebi isn't coming back?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: How come?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sorry but we have to restart your history lessons...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...on our country's heroes from scratch!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Seriously?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Our first lesson will be the story of...

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: ...the wonderful Kozuki Oden!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I still can't believe that Wano's greatest beauty, Komurasaki...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...is really often-sama's daughter!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I heard that the Kappa, Kawamatsu-dono, saved her from the blazing Castle!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: ...what an incredible display of loyalty!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And another scabbard was watching over things this whole time!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Haah!!!

dialogue.speaker: Denjiro
dialogue.text: Kyoshiro, the Noble Yakuza boss...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: ...was really denjiro- Dono in disguise!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Paradise farm

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Does anybody know anything about the man that took down kaido?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: He's apparently a warrior known as joyboy!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I heard he's no longer in the country....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I would have loved to see him in person!! His heroin rivals the legendary god of the blade!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The eternal graves, Ringo

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: We're building another shrine?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Yes.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: From this hill, they'll be overlooking the flower capital...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...just like the god of the blade, Ryuma.

summary: This part advances the Wano Aftermath through 39 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
